data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for allow/deny controls per permission.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to allow or deny controls per permission. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data confirming that such controls are implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for allow/deny controls but lacks concrete evidence to demonstrate that this requirement has been satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of allow/deny controls per permission.
